description: OmniFocus get_active_tasks returned completed tasks including PGA ticket purchase (marked done by David) and the OmniFocus inbox clear task. Presented these as open/active items during boot briefing.
correction: Both tasks were already completed. OmniFocus MCP appears to return completed tasks despite the get_active_tasks call contract. Must verify completion field before surfacing any task.
systemic_fix: Always check completed:false explicitly on each task returned by get_active_tasks before surfacing it. Do not trust the call filter alone — MCP may return stale or completed items.
